description: A shift manager needs to create a picking wave to release a batch of orders to the floor for fulfillment.

nodes.task_description: Filter all pending orders to select a group for the next wave (e.g., all 'Expedited Shipping' orders).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully selects a batch of high-priority orders.

nodes.task_description: Use the wave planning tool to create a new wave from the selected orders.

expected_outcome.value: A new wave is created in the system.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically breaks the wave down into individual picking tasks, optimized by pick path.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates efficient picking assignments for multiple operators.

nodes.task_description: Release the wave, making the picking tasks available to operators on the floor.

expected_outcome.value: The picking tasks appear on the operators' handheld scanners.
